playbook.intent: From signed SOW to first demo-able increment landed in client UAT, with charter, baselined plan, risk register, RACI, comms cadence, and burn-up trend all live.
playbook.scope: From signed SOW to first demo-able increment landed in client UAT, with charter, baselined plan, risk register, RACI, comms cadence, and burn-up trend all live.

success-criteria.criterion: Demo-able increment in client UAT by week 4

stage.name: Charter + kickoff
stage.intent: Bring the SOW alive in a kickoff that locks scope, roles, and cadence.

tasks.task: Draft the project charter from the SOW
Run a client kickoff meeting with both sides
Capture sign-off on scope + roles + cadence

stage.decision-gate: Advance when both sides have signed the charter.

stage.name: RACI + stakeholder register
stage.intent: Lock who decides, does, consults, informs.

tasks.task: Build a RACI matrix tied to the WBS

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every WBS deliverable has a single accountable owner.

stage.name: WBS + baselined plan
stage.intent: Decompose to a baselined schedule + cost plan.

tasks.task: Build a baselined schedule with milestones

stage.decision-gate: Advance when schedule + cost baselines are signed and stored.

stage.name: Risk register
stage.intent: Stand up the live risk register on day one.

tasks.task: Identify top 10 risks from SOW + kickoff

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every top-10 risk has an owner and a next step.

stage.name: Comms cadence

tasks.task: Schedule weekly client status, internal standup, monthly steerco

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the calendar is sent and accepted by the client.

stage.name: Agile ceremonies
stage.intent: Stand up the delivery cadence on the team side.

tasks.task: Stand up daily standups, sprint planning, review, retro

stage.decision-gate: Advance when first sprint completes its cycle.

stage.name: First demo + UAT
stage.intent: Land a demo-able increment in client UAT by week 4.

tasks.task: Build, deploy to UAT, demo to client
Capture feedback into a change-control queue

stage.decision-gate: Required: a working increment in client UAT by week 4.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content project-initiation-to-first-delivery-kickoff-to-week-4 --format md, agent: faion get-content project-initiation-to-first-delivery-kickoff-to-week-4 --format context, json: faion get-content project-initiation-to-first-delivery-kickoff-to-week-4 --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
